attacking_style: Not an attacker; specialized leadout rider who times peak effort at 1000-300m to go in sprint finishes, demonstrating superior pacing judgment.
team_tactics: Functions as final leadout man with emphasis on timing discipline, avoiding premature acceleration and maintaining power through 1000-300m critical window.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint finishes where controlled leadout execution determines outcome; timing advantage most evident on pure power circuits.
vulnerability: Single race sample insufficient to identify weaknesses, though role as leadout specialist suggests vulnerability on climbs and in reduced bunch sprints.
key_patterns: Times leadout peak at 1000m mark, significantly later than rival leadout trains.
Maintains lead through 300m to go, avoiding premature acceleration errors.
Demonstrates tactical superiority over rival leadout specialists through pacing discipline.
form_trajectory: unknown: Only single race observation from 2019; successful leadout execution but insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment.
